1a:T416,PORUNGA & DENDE LUMINOUS DRAGON BALL SET, as seen in "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts! Porunga's titanic size s accentuated by dramatic posability and optional hands that let you re-create your favorite scenes! And an optional head and hands for Dende let you capture his summoning pose! The sculpting, colors, and posability of S.H.Figuarts combine with the sounds and light-up in this amazing set. An NFC reader is built into the stand, and Porugna and Dende are tagged with chips. Place Dende atop the stand and the seven Dragon Balls illuminate, re-creating the dramatic scene of his summoning! And the set includes many recorded lines from both characters that you can play back as well.

Set Contents: Porunga figure, One ogtional left hand and two optional right hands for Porunga, Dende figure, Set of optional hands for Dende, Optional head for Dende, Namekian Dragon Balls (1-7 star versions), Porunga Stand, Dragon Ball Stand, Type-3 Batteries (Sold Separately)

Collect all the glowing versions (the others are included with the S.H.Figuarts Frieza Fourth Form, Dodoria, Zarbon, Son Gohan (Battle Armor), and Krillin (Battle Armor), all sold separately.) </p>

<p>This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.</p>1c:T843,Prime 1 Studio and MegaHouse are very proud to collaborate for this long-awaited entry to our Premium Masterline Series, one of the most iconic antagonists from Dragon Ball Super: 1:4 scale MPMDBZ-04 Golden Frieza! Emperor of a powerful and fearsome race known as the Frost Demons, or Frieza's Race, he possesses an insatiable desire for control and domination, seeking to conquer planets and exploit their resources. He has built quite a reputation for himself throughout the universe for his cruelty, ruthlessness, and immense power. This has led him to destroy Planet Vegeta, Goku and Vegeta's home planet, over the fear of the Saiyan race's growing power and their potential to become a threat to his rule. Following his defeat on Namek at the hands of Super Saiyan Goku, Frieza was rescued by his father. His body was reconstructed with cybernetic enhancements, but he remained unsatisfied with his current state and desired more power and strength. He underwent intense mental and physical training, pushing his limits to new heights. Through sheer determination, he tapped into a new transformation known as "Golden Frieza". Striking his signature Frieza Stance, one foot in from of the other, hands outstretched, he is showing off his significant changes. His body has now become sleek and smooth with a golden metallic skin tone. His muscles are more defined as he gains a heightened aura of power. His energy output greatly surpasses any of his previous forms, taking a golden hue that is LED-illuminated. For the cherry on top, a Dragon Ball Super logo stand for display also comes with this piece. A must-have for Dragon Ball fans everywhere! The set contains 80 raffle tickets and 81* prizes, divided into different prize tiers. The main prizes are usually high-quality, exclusive PVC statues that are only available within these sweepstakes. In addition, there are many smaller prizes such as towels, bags, minifigures, key rings and more.

This set contains:

J - 27x Towel 60 or 25 cm (8 styles)
LAST ONE - 1x Last One figure

Notes:

The contents of the Ichiban Kuji sets are not available for purchase and may only be raffled through the sale of the included raffle tickets in your store. Each prize is marked on a poster, which is also included, so that you can always see which prizes are still available in the respective raffle.

*The last ticket purchased from a set wins twice. In addition to the prize drawn, the buyer of the last ticket also receives the so-called 'The Last One' prize, which is usually a rare PVC statue that is only available in this
